headline: fica tax credit Preparation Checklist — Denver
articleBody:
fica tax credit Preparation Checklist for Denver Clients

Before your fica tax credit appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
